basic_details.job_title: GBPUAT Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology
basic_details.short_information: G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 Senior Research Fellow Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. (Horticulture/ Vegetable Science/ Agricultural Economics) with one year experience in conducting field experiments.
qualification.details: For Senior Research Fellow: M.Sc. (Horticulture/ Vegetable Science/ Agricultural Economics) One year experience in conducting field experiments.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GBPUAT Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Senior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the GBPUAT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download GBPUAT Senior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: For Senior Research Fellow: M.Sc. (Horticulture/ Vegetable Science/ Agricultural Economics) One year experience in conducting field experiments.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for GBPUAT Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GBPUAT Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving applications for the Senior Research Fellow position at GBPUAT is 13 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Senior Research Fellow posts in GBPUAT?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Senior Research Fellow position under the GBPUAT recruitment drive. This offers a good opportunity for eligible candidates in the research field.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Horticulture, Vegetable Science, or Agricultural Economics, along with one year of experience in conducting field experiments, to be eligible for the Senior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Senior Research Fellow position at GBPUAT?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Research Fellow post will receive a salary of Rs. 42,000 per month. This is a project-based position offering competitive remuneration.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for GBPUAT Senior Research Fellow Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Senior Research Fellow position is via email. Candidates need to send their complete application, including bio-data and self-attested documents, to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the GBPUAT Senior Research Fellow recruitment. Candidates can apply without any fee payment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Research Fellow position at GBPUAT primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. When is the interview date for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The interview for the Senior Research Fellow position is scheduled for 14 July 2026. Candidates who have applied successfully should prepare for the interview on this date.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Senior Research Fellow position is Pantnagar, Uttarakhand, specifically at the G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology. It's a project-based role within the university.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to apply for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Applicants need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs along with their bio-data. Ensure all documents are clear and legible.
